title: Longtime UFO Investigator Says ‘The Government Will Never Disclose’ the Truth About Aliens: ‘It’s All Smoke and Mirror Stuff’
description: The government released over 160 declassified UFO files last week after President Trump ordered maximum transparency on alien life and unidentified aerial phenomena. Director of National Intelligence Tulsi Gabbard called it a commitment to giving “the American people maximum transparency.” Not everyone was impressed. Dennis Anderson has been investigating UFOs for 63 years.
